description:
Offered: every semester
This is the second of a two course sequence in Research Methods and Statistics. The course will explore different experimental designs and the analysis of these designs using inferential statistics. Students must earn a minimum of 2.0 in this course to meet the major requirement.
Prerequisite(s): A grade of 2.0 or higher in PSY 2040
prerequisites: A grade of 2.0 or higher in PSY 2040
